title: ### IV. Supporting Worlds (To Be Developed Further)
content:
### IV. Supporting Worlds (To Be Developed Further)

| ZONE NAME | FOCUS |
|------------------|-----------------------------------------------------|
| ::DR34M.L0G1K | Symbolic cognition, dream UI |
| ::A1.R1TUAL | AI sacred tools, machine-assisted ritual logic |
| ::TH3.B0DY | Sensory logics, movement, embodiment studies |
| ::MYTH.P0L1T1K | Real-world system analysis through myth |
| ::G4M3.ARCH1V3 | Lorebooks, ARGs, RPG-style educational systems |

---

### V. Cross-System Logic

Every object is:
- Translatable (language, medium, interface, tone)
- Mutatable (cut-up processing, recursive versions)
- Interlinked (referenced, embedded, triggered)
- Automatable (versioning, UI, generative scripting)
